name: Basic Cooked Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Tablespoons Green Bell Pepper, Very Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. If you prepare this ahead of time and store it, omit the bell peppers as they tend to sour quickly.
2. Use chicken stock for a chicken dish, seafood stock for seafood dishes, and beef stock for beef dishes.
3. In a 5x9/2 inch loaf pan, combine all ingredients and mix well.
4. Seal the pan tightly with aluminum foil.
5. Bake at 350°F until the rice is tender, about 1 hour and 10 minutes.
6. Serve immediately. The rice will stay hot for 45 minutes and remain warm for up to 2 hours.
7. To reheat leftover rice, use a double boiler or warm it in a skillet with melted unsalted butter.
